offer: For logistics carriers processing 10–50 invoices/month, overcharges on freight bills cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile freight bills against carrier contracts instead of manual reconciliation processes or spreadsheets.
problem: Overcharges on freight bills due to lack of reconciliation with carrier contracts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual bill entry and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for key tasks
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
